Line 1929: WriteLiteral(@">
Line 1930:                         To sign up for the Intelleges 10-day HS3 Free Trial you will need to<br>
Line 1931:                         provide your information on the form on this page and click on the<br>
Line 1932:                         Free Trial Button.
Line 1933:                         <br>
Line 1934:                         <br>
Line 1935:                         You will receive an email with a link to a questionnaire. Once you<br>
Line 1936:                         complete the questionnaire you will have access to the HS3 Enterprise<br>
Line 1937:                         system with the same access as paid subscribers.
Line 1938:                         <br>
Line 1939:                         <br>
Line 1940:                         Please note that if you do not subscribe after 10-days your data will not<br>
Line 1941:                         be saved.
Line 1942:                         <br>
Line 1943:                         <br>
Line 1944:                         Call our 5-109-COMPLY phone number if you have any additional<br>

Line 1946:                         <br>
Line 1947:                         <br>
Line 1948:                         Thanks!

Line 3626: 
Line 3627: WriteLiteral(@">
Line 3628:                                         Intelleges’ provides a simple, streamlined platform for companies to collect, store
Line 3629:                         and share compliance information securely.
Line 3630:                                     </p>
Line 3631:                                     <p");
Line 3632: 
Line 3633: EndContext("~/Views/Admin/Index.cshtml", 36663, 276, true);
Line 3634: 
Line 3635: BeginContext("~/Views/Admin/Index.cshtml", 36939, 45, true);
Line 3636: 
Line 3637: WriteLiteral(" class=\"font-size-12 text-align-adjust-small\"");
Line 3638: 
Line 3639: EndContext("~/Views/Admin/Index.cshtml", 36939, 45, true);
Line 3640: 
Line 3641: BeginContext("~/Views/Admin/Index.cshtml", 36984, 1068, true);
Line 3642: 
Line 3643: WriteLiteral(@">
Line 3644:                                         In recent years, corporations who manage and operate large global supplier and customer
Line 3645:                         ecosystems have been forced to understand, develop, collect and report on increasing
Line 3646:                         amounts of regulatory data about these third parties to the jurisdictions in which
Line 3647:                         they do business. Regulations surrounding protocols such as physical and information
Line 3648:                         security; privacy and confidentiality; and small business/diversity continue to
Line 3649:                         proliferate. They are particularly onerous for firms that do business under contracts
Line 3650:                         with governmental authorities and/or in countries that are of security concern.
Line 3651:                         This problem will worsen as companies become more global, competition increases
Line 3652:                         and economic powers seek to level the playing field for international trade.
Line 3653:                                     </p>
Line 3654:                                     <p");
Line 3655:

Line 3665: 
Line 3666: WriteLiteral(@">
Line 3667:                                         Compliance data collection requirements exceed the scope of traditional Supply Chain
Line 3668:                         Management (SCM), ERP, CRM or GRC systems. Consequently, in even the largest firms,
Line 3669:                         third party compliance is a largely manual, time consuming and cumbersome effort.
Line 3670:                         For each app licable regulation, teams are typically assembled to understand regulations
Line 3671:                         and produce questionnaires, which are manually distributed across a network of tens
Line 3672:                         of thousands of suppliers and customers and whose responses are then summarized
Line 3673:                         and collated, usually through Microsoft Excel, into reports. The current process,
Line 3674:                         in most companies, bears significant time, cost and reputation risk.
Line 3675:                                     </p>
Line 3676:                                     <p");
Line 3677: 
Line 3678: EndContext("~/Views/Admin/Index.cshtml", 38097, 954, true);

Line 3721:                                 replaces manual and/or spreadsheet based systems and has been proven to improve
Line 3722:                                 response times, increase convenience, and significantly reduce compliance costs
Line 3723:                                 and risks. </li>

Line 4733: 
Line 4734: WriteLiteral(">\r\n                                <p>\r\n                                    Intel" +
Line 4735: "leges founder, Mr. Betancourt focuses on helping companies remain compliant\r\n   " +
Line 4736: "         in a constantly changing world. Working on key strategic issues day-to-" +
Line 4737: "day at Intelleges,\r\n            his focus is broad strategy, innovation, and key" +
Line 4738: " initiatives. Intelleges allows\r\n            businesses to collect, store and sh" +
Line 4739: "are compliance information easily, ensuring that\r\n            companies comply w" +
Line 4740: "ith the data and document collection demands of many regulatory\r\n            req" +
Line 4741: "uirements globally. Specific protocols include Foreign Corrupt Practices Act,\r\n " +
Line 4742: "           Buy American Act, eSRS (SF-295), Customs Trade Partnership Against Te" +
Line 4743: "rrorism, and\r\n            many others. Keeping compliance information current an" +
Line 4744: "d up to date and compliance\r\n            costs down is how companies stay compet" +
Line 4745: "itive in a globalized world. Mr. Betancourt\r\n            works to provide though" +
Line 4746: "t leadership in the global compliance arena, and maintaining\r\n            custom" +
Line 4747: "ers up to date on industry best practices, monitoring key trends, information\r\n " +
Line 4748: "           requirements, privacy and regulatory changes, and helping firms reduc" +
Line 4749: "e costs by\r\n            streamlining the overall process.\r\n            <br>\r\n   " +
Line 4750: "                                 <br>\r\n                                    <b>Pr" +
Line 4751: "inceton University, A.B (Philosophy)</b>\r\n                                </p>\r\n" +
Line 4752: "                            </div>\r\n                            <h3");
Line 4753:

Line 5030: 
Line 5031: WriteLiteral(">\r\n                                    25 years of corporate in-house and private" +
Line 5032: " practice legal experience related to\r\n            ensuring compliance with a br" +
Line 5033: "oad range of regulatory issues (international and U.S.\r\n            marketing an" +
Line 5034: "d sales activities in the pharmaceutical and healthcare sectors, pricing\r\n      " +
Line 5035: "      and antitrust, FDA, securities, privacy). Assists multi-national companies" +
Line 5036: " in establishing\r\n            or enhancing integrated compliance programs with r" +
Line 5037: "egard to anti-corruption, economic\r\n            sanctions, export controls, impo" +
Line 5038: "rt issues (including C-TPAT) and anti-boycott compliance\r\n            and in est" +
Line 5039: "ablishing and undertaking audit programs (and remediation, as necessary)\r\n      " +
Line 5040: "      of third-party relationships. Working with companies in the Middle East, C" +
Line 5041: "entral\r\n            & Eastern Europe, Latin America and Asia regarding these" +
Line 5042: " different trade regulatory\r\n            environments and establishing innovativ" +
Line 5043: "e multi-platform compliance programs that\r\n            have broad exposure to a " +
Line 5044: "full range of substantive legal and risk management issues.\r\n            <br>\r\n " +
Line 5045: "                                   <b>The University of Chicago Law School, J.D." +
Line 5046: "; The Fletcher School of Law and Diplomacy,\r\n                Tufts University, M" +
Line 5047: ".A. in Law and Diplomacy; Haverford College, B.A.</b>\r\n                         " +
Line 5048: "       </p>\r\n                            </div>\r\n                        </div>\r" +
Line 5049: "\n\r\n                    </div>\r\n                </div>\r\n\r\n            </div>\r\n\r\n\r" +
Line 5050: "\n\r\n            <!-- .main-content-left -->\r\n        </div>\r\n        <!-- .main-c" +
Line 5051: "ontent -->\r\n\r\n        <div");
Line 5052:
